title: Mitra Ai
desc: Your intelligent Nepali AI companion — built to help, entertain, and inform with a touch of local soul.

title: ClearBG.ai
desc: ClearBG.ai is a professional-grade, AI-powered background removal tool designed for high-resolution image processing with zero cost to the user.

title: आजको समाचार
desc: Aajako Samachar is your ultimate destination for the latest news, breaking stories, and in-depth analysis from across Nepal and the world. Designed for a fast-paced lifestyle, this app aggregates news from over 10+ trusted sources, delivering a seamless and clutter-free reading experience.

title: Pay Paisa(Beta)
desc: Pay Paisa is a fintech platform that provides secure payment gateway solutions, APIs, and digital financial services to help businesses and individuals manage transactions easily.

title: Nepali Calculator
desc: A Nepali language calculator that lets users perform basic arithmetic while displaying numbers and results in Nepali digits (०–९)
